news.t: Newly-listed GlacierShares Nasdaq Iceland ETF (GLCR) to track the MarketVector Iceland Global Index

holdings.infoBox: GLCR is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Íslandsbanki stock at 15.07%, Arion banki at 13.01%, Alvotech at 5.38%, Embla Medical at 5.24%, and Amaroq at 5.22%.

overview.description: The GlacierShares Nasdaq Iceland ETF (GLCR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Iceland Global index. The fund is passively managed index of Icelandic companies and companies related to the Iceland economy. The narrow portfolio is selected and weighted based on market-cap GLCR was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by Teucrium.

data.title: Newly-listed GlacierShares Nasdaq Iceland ETF (GLCR) to track the MarketVector Iceland Global Index
data.text: FRANKFURT, Germany--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MarketVector IndexesTM (“MarketVector”), a leading provider of multi-asset and digital asset index solutions, today announced that the MarketVectorTM Iceland Globa...
